name: siyuan-auto-seq-number
description: A SiYuan Plugin to auto generate sequence number for headers

scripts.verify: pnpm run lint && pnpm run test && pnpm run build
scripts.test: tsx --test tests/infra/siyuan_api.test.ts tests/numbering/heading_line.test.ts tests/numbering/marker_codec.test.ts tests/numbering/numbering_engine.test.ts tests/numbering/prefix_cleaner.test.ts tests/numbering/regression-cases.test.ts tests/plugin/doc-enable.test.ts tests/plugin/doc-id.test.ts tests/plugin/dom-block-updater.test.ts tests/plugin/dom-heading-fallback.test.ts tests/plugin/dynamic-loading-policy.test.ts tests/plugin/index-controller.test.ts tests/plugin/markdown-dom-sync.test.ts tests/plugin/protyle-reload.test.ts tests/plugin/realtime-input.test.ts tests/plugin/realtime-trigger.test.ts tests/plugin/update-view-sync.test.ts tests/services/numbering_service.test.ts

author: Logic Tan
